category_sources: Official Streamlink GitHub README describes a Python library and CLI that pipes streams from services into a video player.
source_facts.description says Streamlink is a CLI for extracting streams from websites to a video player.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and documentation brand the project as Streamlink.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to Streamlink documentation and CLI documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Streamlink documentation site.
repo_sources: Official Streamlink GitHub repository is https://github.com/streamlink/streamlink and its README points to streamlink.github.io.
tags_sources: Official Streamlink README topics and description include streaming, livestream, video player, Python, and CLI.
source_facts.description describes extracting streams to a video player.
